outcome_record.event_name: State of Origin 2027 Game 2 — NSW Blues vs Queensland Maroons (Series Decider — tied 1-1)

calibration_flags.notes: State of Origin decider validated. Decider pressure modifier ×1.08 correctly applied. SOO G2 decider (tied series) = highest stakes single SOO match — confirmed as elevated signal vs G1. NSW home court advantage confirmed as real predictor even with full Queensland squad.
